zh.Salisbury, Wiltshire, England: 英國維爾爾索爾茲伯里
zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert d'Evereux於大約1067年出生在英國賀福爾賀福德時，他的父親Walter d'Evreux36歲，母親Philippa Normandie32歲。他於1089年與Eloise de Longchamp在英國可瓦爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於大約1157年在他的家鄉享年92歲。

zh-hans.Salisbury, Wiltshire, England: 英国維爾爾索爾茲伯里
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Robert d'Evereux于大约1067年出生在英国賀福爾賀福德时，他的父亲Walter d'Evreux36岁，母亲Philippa Normandie32岁。他于1089年与Eloise de Longchamp在英国可瓦爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于大约1157年在他的家乡享年92岁。

nameMeanings.name: d'Evereux
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Dermot, Sean.
English and Irish: of Norman origin, a habitational name for someone from Évreux in Eure, France, with the preposition d(e). See also Everest for the name without the preposition.

History: This was the surname of the Earls of Essex from 1572 to 1641. Walter Devereux, 1st Earl of Essex, led an attempted colonization of Ulster, and his son, Robert, 2nd Earl of Essex, briefly held the position of lord lieutenant of Ireland in 1599.

variants.name: Devereaux
meanings: English and Irish: of Norman origin, a variant of   Devereux  .

variants.name: Everest
meanings: English (southeastern): of Norman origin, a variant of Devereux without the fused preposition (Old French de). Compare Evers .

variants.name: Evers
meanings: English: perhaps a variant of Devereux without the fused preposition (Old French de).

English: de-aspirated variant of Heaver, with post-medieval excrescent -s, a habitational name from Hever (Kent), named from Old English hēah ‘high’ + (Kentish) Old English ēfre ‘edge or brow of a hill’. Alternatively, the name may derive from some minor place in southeastern England named with Old English ȳfre, (Kentish) Old English ēfre, Middle English evere ‘edge or brow of a hill, tip of a promontory’, with the addition of a prosthetic H-.
North German and Dutch: genitivized patronymic from the personal name Evert , which lost its t in pronunciation and spelling subsequently; compare Everts . Compare also Avers .

variants.name: Deveraux
meanings: English and Irish: of Norman origin, a variant of   Devereux  .

variants.name: Devery
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Kieran, Brendan, Clancy.
Irish (Offaly): of Norman origin, a variant of   Devereux  .

variants.name: Devary
meanings: Probably Irish: variant of Devery, a variant of Devereux in counties Leix and Offaly.

variants.name: Debrow
meanings: Altered form of English or Irish   Devereux  .

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: Domesday Book
historicEvents.description: Domesday Book is Britain's earliest extant public record with information containing land surveys and landholdings commissioned by William I. The book was completed in 1086.

historicEvents.title: The Crusades
historicEvents.description: A series of religious wars between Christians and Muslims, known as the Crusades, occurred between 1096 and 1291, and played a large role in European Christian dominance in the Middle East.

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

en.lifeSummary: When Robert d'Evereux was born about 1067, in Hereford, Herefordshire, England, his father, Walter d'Evreux, was 36 and his mother, Philippa Normandie, was 32. He married Eloise de Longchamp in 1089, in Cornwall, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died about 1157, in his hometown, at the age of 92.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert d'Evereux est né environ 1067, à Hereford, Herefordshire, Angleterre, son père, Walter d'Evreux, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Philippa Normandie, avait 32 ans. Il a épousé Eloise de Longchamp en 1089, à Cornouailles, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé environ 1157, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 92 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert d'Evereux um 1067 in Hereford, Herefordshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Walter d'Evreux 36 und seine Mutter Philippa Normandie 32. Er hat 1089 in Cornwall, England Eloise de Longchamp geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb um 1157 im Alter von 92 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Robert d'Evereux è nato il circa 1067 nel Hereford, Herefordshire, England, il suo padre, Walter d'Evreux, aveva 36 anni e il suo madre, Philippa Normandie, aveva 32 anni. Lui sposato Eloise de Longchamp nel 1089, nel Cornwall, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì circa 1157, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 92 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert d'Evereuxが約1067年にイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアハーエフォードで生まれた時，父Walter d'Evreuxは36歳，母Philippa Normandieは32歳であった。1089年にイギリスコルンワルでEloise de Longchampと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は約1157年に故郷で92歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert d'Evereux(이)가 대략 1067년 영국 허퍼드실르 허퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Walter d'Evreux(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Philippa Normandie(은)는 32세였다. 그는 1089년 영국 코른월에서 Eloise de Longchamp(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 대략 1157년 그의 고향에서 92세의 나이로 사망했다.

mg.about 1067–about 1157: tany ho any amin'ny 1067–tany ho any amin'ny 1157

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert d'Evereux nasceu aproximadamente 1067, em Hereford, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Walter d'Evreux, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Philippa Normandie, tinha 32 anos. Ele casou-se com Eloise de Longchamp em 1089, em Cornwall, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1157, em sua cidade natal, com 92 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert d'Evereux родился около 1067 г. в местности хирефорд, хирефордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Walter d'Evreux было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Philippa Normandie, 32. Он женился на женщине по имени Eloise de Longchamp в 1089 г. в местности корнвалл, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер около 1157 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 92 лет.

sm.about 1067–about 1157: e tusa o le 1067–e tusa o le 1157

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Robert d'Evereux nació aproximadamente 1067, en Hereford, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Walter d'Evreux, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Philippa Normandie, tenía 32 años. Se casó con Eloise de Longchamp en 1089, en Cornwall, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió aproximadamente 1157, en su pueblo, a la edad de 92 años.
